info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: " Yi zvapa - Saye  ' halantyam ' (1.3.3) iti ItvaprasaNgAt ' Yi zvap Saye ' iti apapAWaH iti DAtukAvyavyAKyAyAm  (2.51) yujyate cEtat  yataH sarvezu api DAtupAWezu ' Yi zvap Saye  udAttet  anudAttaH ' iti paWyate  ' udAttet ' ityasya udAttopadeSaH akAraH itsaMjYakaH atra ityeva Kalu arTaH ? ataSca prAmAdikaH sArvatrikaH ' zvap ' iti halantyapAWaH ityeva nyAyyam  ataH eva apapAWaH SoDitaH DAtukAvyavyAKyAtfmahASayena " iti kfdantarUpamAlA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tataH prasizvide kfzRaH svinnaScArjunamabravIt' (BA॰droRa॰19.21) praSabda AdikarmaRi syAdanarTako vA prakarzadyotakastu na svinna ityanantarokteH
'aTa rAtryAM vyatItAyAmavasuptamanantaram' (rA0 2561) avasuptamIzat suptam iti tilakakAro rAmaH
'taM Sabdamavasuptastu jawAyuraTa SuSruve' (rA0 3501) ukto'rTaH sTAne'vaSabdaprayogo vaSyavAcaH kaveH Izatsupta eva SabdaM SfRuyAnna prasuptaH suzupto vA
'iyaM padmAvatyavasuptA (svapna0 5) atrAsTAne'vaH na hyatra svApasyAlpatA'BipretA leKakapramAdo vA'yaM syAt

'acakitamavasuptaM pARqavAnAmanIkam niSi suniSitaSastro droRasUnurjaGAna' (kA0 nI0 sA0 1971).. atrAvaH sutamAmanizwaH arTaM hi viparyAsayati gAQaM suptAnAmeva pARqavAnAM vaDaH Sakyo drORinA na tvavasuptAnAmIzatsuptAnAm manye kAmandako'trAnarTakamavaM prayuNkte svApamAtraM ca vivakzate
'tadAhurnAgnirupasTeyaH kaSSreyAMsaM vizuptaM boDayizyatIti' (Apa0 SrO0 67271) vizuptaM prasuptaM suzuptam
'kimasmAnducCunAyase ni zu svapa' (f0 7554) nIcEH susvapihItyAha niSabdo'Do'rTe suH sOzWave
